title: Multiple Myeloma Public Review Release Gate Pass v0

sources.label: Multiple Myeloma Public Review And Release Gate v0
Multiple Myeloma Public Loop Completion Handoff v0

limitations: Does not provide eligibility guidance, expanded-access guidance, monitoring guidance, or publication authorization for any person.
Does not claim that multiple myeloma has been cured.
Does not complete expert review or clinical review.
Does not prove source coverage is comprehensive.
Does not inspect private lab records or real case data.
Does not authorize generated claims, ranking, recommendation behavior, patient matching, trial matching, review-packet assembly, or publication workflow.
Does not require credentials, paid APIs, account changes, restricted datasets, clinician decisions, sponsor decisions, regulatory decisions, or institutional decisions.
